hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'rm\s+(-[^\s]*)?\s*-rf\s+(~/|\$HOME|/Users/|/home/|/[a-zA-Z]/Users/)'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"BLOCKED: Dangerous rm -rf home directory command detected."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|;|&&|\|\|)[[:space:]]*npm[[:space:]]'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Use bun instead of npm."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|;|&&|\|\|)[[:space:]]*pip3?[[:space:]]'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Use uv instead of pip."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|;|&&|\|\|)[[:space:]]*(ssh|scp|sftp)[[:space:]]'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Do not ssh into remote hosts. Use rsync if you must move files across the network."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'op[[:space:]]+read'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"op read is blocked to prevent credential exposure. Use op run to inject secrets instead."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE -- '--no-minimum-release-age|--minimum-release-age[= ]+0|--ignore-min-release-age'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"BLOCKED: --no-minimum-release-age (or equivalent --minimum-release-age=0) bypasses bun/npm protection against freshly-published packages (supply-chain risk). Wait for the release age window, or download the tarball directly with curl from registry.npmjs.org and inspect it."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0
